name: Neo Sage-Your Arch Nemesis
description:
"I have been expecting you.."

200 years into the future and Eggman is long dead with his A.I. Daughter taking up the reign of the Eggman Empire.

While Society has collasped and the Empire tries to take over the world, You stand in her way of World domination.

Art by @KornArt3 on Twitter, Go Support him!
creator: -Banny-
